title: HOZELOCK - Universal Connection Kit ø 13 mm (1/2") 1.5 m : Connection Adapter for Reel - Cart, Supplied with 1 Tap Connector Ø 21mm - 26.5mm [6005R0000], Grey, Yellow
features: Connect your Hozelock Hose Reel or Cart to an outdoor tap in seconds
Comes ready to use with attached connectors
description: From the manufacturer Hozelock Hose Connection Set Connects the hose system to an outside tap. Hose Connection Set Made from high quality materials, this Hozelock Hose Connection Set is the perfect way to connect your Hozelock Hose Reel or Cart to your outdoor tap without scarficing length of your precious hose. It is 1.5m in length and comes ready for use with a 3/4″ or 1/2″ threaded tap connector that fits 95 per cent of all outdoor taps and two hose end connectors. Simple and quick to set up. Maintenance Ensure connectors are tightly fastened To secure the connection: simply unwind the connector, push the hose firmly inside, then tighten the connector Key Benefits Include: Connect your Hozelock Hose Reel or Cart to an outdoor tap in seconds. 1.5m in length. Made from high quality material. Comes ready to use with attached connectors. Can fit 95 per cent of outdoor taps.
